Why Maple Lane

Experience the Difference
on Your First Clean

We built Maple Lane around the standard we'd want in our own home real employees, real accountability, real results.

Expert, Vetted W2 Employees

Every cleaner is a background-checked W2 employee, not a gig contractor. We hire, train, and stand behind every person we send to your home.

Satisfaction Guaranteed

If anything isn't right, we come back and fix it. No questions, no hassle. Your satisfaction is the only thing that matters to us.

Consistently 5-Star Rated

Our clients don't just hire us once they come back. Consistent, high-quality results you can count on every single visit.

Professional Cleaning for
Every Need

Standard Clean

2–3 hrs · recurring maintenance

From $129

Vacuum, sweep & mop all floors
Full bathroom scrub & disinfect
Kitchen counters, appliances & microwave

General

Dust lamps, shades & picture frames
Dust furniture, window sills & vents
Clean mirrors and all surfaces
Vacuum, sweep & mop all floors
Empty trash & replace liners
Remove cobwebs
Make beds (linen change upon request)
Cushions & pillows fluffed and straightened
General straightening completed

Kitchen

Wipe down all appliance exteriors
Clean microwave exterior
Clean & disinfect countertops and backsplash
Clean & disinfect sinks and faucets
Clean table, chairs & cabinet exteriors
Inside fridge, oven, or cabinets

Bathroom

Scrub tub, shower door & inside of shower
Clean toilets inside, out, base & behind
Clean exterior of vanities
Clean countertops, sinks & faucets
Chrome fixtures cleaned & shined
Fold and hang towels neatly
Heavy scrub of tile & grout
Heavy scrub of sinks, tub & shower

Deep & Move-Out Only

Baseboards & wall marks
Doorframes & light switches
Interior windows
Garage & basement sweep

FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know about our cleaning services in Beaverton.

Every standard clean includes kitchen surfaces, bathroom scrubbing, vacuuming and mopping all floors, baseboard cleaning, and interior window cleaning where specified.
Yes our team brings all cleaning supplies and equipment. You don't need to provide anything. If you have specific product preferences, just let us know when you book.
Pricing depends on the size of your home, type of cleaning service, and frequency. We offer competitive rates with no hidden fees. Get a free quote online or call us for an estimate based on your specific needs.
We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If anything isn't right, contact us within 24 hours and we'll return to re-clean at no charge. No arguments, no hassle.
Yes. Every member of our team is a W2 employee who has passed a full background check. We do not use independent contractors or gig workers.
100%
